further_reading.title: New Tools and Features in the Responses API
further_reading.why_relevant: Provides current API-level context for model/tool selection and how application design choices affect capabilities like tool use and workflow orchestration.

notes: Module is predominantly pedagogical and uses generic, non-quantified examples. It does not make dated, vendor-specific, statistical, incident-based, or standards-based claims that require inline citations under the current citation-density rules.
